# JOONG WOO HRD — full reference

## Entity facts

- Legal name (Korean): 주식회사 정우인력개발
- Legal name (English): Jungwoo Human Development Co., Ltd.
- Brand: 정우인재개발원 / JOONG WOO HRD
- Business registration number: 684-13-02918
- Address: 경기도 용인시 기흥구 구갈로28번길 21-6, 금보빌딩 6층 6034호
- Direct training country: Nepal
- Direct sourcing country: Nepal
- Partner sourcing countries: Vietnam and Laos
- Destination employment markets: South Korea and Japan
- Confirmed public email: joongwoohrd@gmail.com (for all recruitment and partnership inquiries)
- Confirmed public phone, social profiles and inquiry form: none in this release

## Services and status information

- [Services](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/services)
- [All visa/status information](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa)
- [Korea E-9](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa/e-9)
- [Korea E-7](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa/e-7)
- [Korea D-2 and D-4](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa/d-2-d-4)
- [Japan Specified Skilled Worker](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa/tokutei-ginou)
- [Japan SSW nursing care](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa/tokutei-ginou-kaigo)
- [Japan SSW accommodation](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa/tokutei-ginou-shukuhaku)
- [Japan employment for skill development](https://www.joongwoohrd.com/visa/ikusei-shuro)

These pages provide general information. Eligibility and procedure must be checked against the responsible authority for each case.

## Source and review policy

Each article includes at least two official primary sources and the dates they were checked. New articles use the source-verification method `official-primary-sources`. No human reviewer is named unless a real person has reviewed that specific article. The content is general information and not individual legal, labor, immigration or administrative advice.
